title: JNVST Class 6 Result 2026

detail.title: JNVST Class 6 Result 2026
detail.short_info: Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti Result 2026 released for Class 6 Phase 2 Entrance Exam on the official website - navodaya.gov.in on 22-05-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the JNVST result.

content.text: Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti (NVS) has officially released the JNVST Class 6 Phase 2 Result 2026 for students who appeared in the entrance examination. The results are now available online for admission into Class 6 across Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalayas for the academic session 2026-27.

JNVST Class 6 Result 2026 has been published online on the official website - https://navodaya.gov.in. Students who appeared for the Phase 2 exam can check and download their results using their roll number and date of birth through the official result portal.
Candidates are advised to carefully verify all details mentioned in the result and contact the respective authorities in case of any discrepancies.

sections.heading: Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti Results 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti has released the Class 6 Phase 2 entrance exam results for the 2026 academic session. Students can access their selection status online through the official website using their login credentials.

sections.heading: Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti Result 2026 Direct Link

content.text: The direct link to check JNVST Class 6 Phase 2 Result 2026 has been activated by the authorities. Students can instantly view and download their results through the official portal using the link provided below.

sections.heading: How to Download JNVST Class 6 Result 2026

content.text: Follow these simple steps to check your Navodaya Class 6 result online:

items: Click on the "JNVST Class 6 Result 2026" link
You will be redirected to the result portal
Enter your Roll Number and Date of Birth
Your result will appear on the screen
Download and take a printout for future reference
